tasks.task: Baseline all fourteen active repositories and record current branch cleanliness and synchronization state.
Add a regression readback that distinguishes pre-existing dirty files from wave-owned changes.
Coordinate the Architecture topology ADR for the proposed five product boundaries.
Validate that topology authority ownership has no undocumented overlapping final decisions.
Generate a stack lockfile containing repository commit version maturity and owner fields.
Add lockfile validation for missing commits duplicate repositories and unsupported authority claims.
Expand the Architecture readiness inventory to include Mission and Blueprint explicitly.
Add a wording regression that separates documentation readiness from system readiness.
Inventory active JSON schemas and distinct schema versions while excluding generated evidence explicitly.
Assign one canonical producer owner and lifecycle classification to every contract.
Generate a producer consumer compatibility matrix for gate-critical contracts.
Add fail-closed fixtures for unknown schemas unsupported versions and field drift.
Audit Mission completion metrics against the handoff-count correction commit.
Project implementation completion separately from handoff and readback evidence.
Add a red-green regression test for handoff-only nodes not counting complete.
Measure tracked source test schema fixture and evidence bytes in Atlas and Foundry.
Write a content-addressed evidence catalog plan retaining small replayable golden fixtures.
Guard evidence records against missing schema source digest and evidence-class fields.
Coordinate minimal hosted CI coverage for Arena native tests and static checks.
Verify Arena workflow-equivalent commands locally without provider calls or uploads.
Coordinate minimal hosted CI coverage for Crucible native tests and static checks.
Verify Crucible workflow-equivalent commands locally without changing dependencies or policy.
Coordinate minimal hosted CI coverage for Sentinel native tests and static checks.
Verify Sentinel workflow-equivalent commands locally and preserve fixture wording boundaries.
Bind Arena Crucible and Sentinel CI conclusions into one readiness rollup.
Validate every new Atlas wave evidence file with schema and digest checks.
Bind Foundry one-safe-node readiness to the consolidation wave source digests.
Generate compact Command readback for wave progress exact action and denial state.
Generate Promoter no-promotion rollup with explicit denied authority and RSI state.
Run a scoped public-safety wording scan over changed documentation and workflows.
Record PR required-check merge and CI timing evidence for every touched repository.
Record post-merge local and remote branch cleanup before selecting another node.
Scan wave artifacts for provider release credential and authority-widening instructions.
Generate at least forty ranked Month 2 contract convergence recommendations.
Reconcile Mission Atlas Foundry Command Sentinel and Promoter terminal readbacks.
Close the wave only after verification cleanup and exact next prompt agree.
